name: spec-obsidian-connector
description: MCP connector for importing Obsidian local vault pages into SpecTeam. Syncs Obsidian Markdown files into .spec/design/.

resources.name: Recent Obsidian Notes
resources.description: List recently modified notes in the Obsidian vault

tools.name: obsidian_read_note
tools.description: Fetch an Obsidian note by path and prepare for SpecTeam import.

note_path.description: Relative path to the note in the Obsidian vault (e.g., 'Projects/Payment.md')

tools.name: obsidian_list_folder
tools.description: List notes in an Obsidian folder.

folder_path.description: Relative path to the folder in the vault

tools.name: obsidian_search
tools.description: Search across the Obsidian vault by keyword.

authentication.description: Local file path to the Obsidian vault.
